name: Credit Firm
description_short: Credit Firm is a credit repair law firm founded in 1997 that disputes negative items on credit reports using FCRA and related consumer protection laws to improve credit scores.
description_long:
Credit Firm was established in 1997 and has operated for over 20 years as a credit repair service founded by a team of attorneys specializing in consumer credit law and FCRA violations. The company positions itself as a legal-focused credit repair firm with in-house legal staff dedicated to advocating against credit reporting agencies and credit furnishers on behalf of consumers.

The company offers a comprehensive credit repair service model centered on disputing negative and inaccurate items on credit reports. Their core offering includes a legal in-depth credit audit, unlimited credit bureau challenges (typically 5-7 accounts per bureau per round), unlimited procedural compliance verification to ensure FCRA section 611 compliance, unlimited inquiry challenges to verify permissible purpose, personal information variation corrections, and goodwill interventions with creditors. All services are included in a single flat monthly fee of $49.99 with no long-term contracts—clients can cancel anytime.

Credit Firm distinguishes itself primarily through its attorney-founded background and emphasis on leveraging consumer protection laws including FACRA, FCRA, FDCPA, FCBA, and HIPAA. The company claims a 97% client referral rate and highlights customer testimonials showing credit score improvements. Their unlimited dispute model contrasts with tiered approaches, allowing clients to dispute as many accounts as needed for the same monthly fee. The website emphasizes legal compliance verification and procedural violations as removal mechanisms.

While the company presents strong credentials and transparent pricing, potential clients should note that credit repair outcomes are inherently variable and depend on the nature of disputed items. The website contains no information about average timelines, success rates by dispute type, or independent verification of claims. As with all credit repair services, results are not guaranteed, and legitimate negative items cannot be removed regardless of legal leverage.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. Credit Firm states that the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) prohibits result-based guarantees.

tiers.name: Individual
features: Unlimited disputes with all 3 bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Dedicated credit consultant (single point of contact)

tiers.name: Couples
features: All Individual plan features for two people
Unlimited disputes for both clients across all 3 bureaus
Unlimited inquiry challenges for both clients
Goodwill interventions and debt validation for both
Dedicated credit consultant for each client
Significant savings versus two separate Individual enrollments

pros: Flat $49.99/month pricing with unlimited disputes—clients pay the same fee whether disputing 5 or 50 accounts
Founded and staffed by attorneys specializing in consumer credit law and FCRA violations, providing legal expertise rather than just administrative services
No long-term contracts; clients can cancel anytime without penalty
Unlimited procedural compliance verification to ensure credit bureaus follow FCRA section 611 requirements
Addresses multiple dispute angles including inquiry challenges, personal information variations, and goodwill interventions
Claims 97% client referral rate and provides specific customer testimonials with credit score improvements
Free consultation and credit evaluation available by phone
cons: Website provides no data on average timelines for results, dispute success rates by category, or realistic expectations
No independent verification of claimed 97% referral rate or customer testimonial authenticity
Credit repair outcomes vary significantly based on dispute validity; the company cannot remove accurate negative items regardless of legal arguments
Limited transparency on how many disputes typically get deleted versus challenged or updated
Website content appears incomplete (text cuts off mid-sentence in the Goodwill Interventions section)
best_for: Consumers with multiple inaccurate or unverifiable negative items on credit reports seeking legal-focused dispute strategy
Individuals with inquiries on their reports who want systematic verification of permissible purpose
People preparing for major financial decisions (home purchase, auto loan) who need credit improvement within a structured timeline
diagnosis: Credit Firm is best for consumers with inaccurate or procedurally-violated negative items on their credit reports who want a legal-focused approach and can commit to a monthly fee model. The main caveat is that credit repair outcomes depend entirely on dispute validity—the company cannot remove accurate negative information, and no timeline or success rate guarantees are provided on their website.
services: Legal in-depth credit audit analyzing all trade-lines and negative items
Unlimited credit bureau challenges to Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion (typically 5-7 per bureau per round)
Procedural compliance verification ensuring FCRA section 611 compliance
Unlimited inquiry challenges to verify permissible purpose
Personal information variation removal (inaccurate names, addresses, employer/phone variations)
Investigations with collection agencies, Lexis Nexis, and other credit furnishers
Action plan development based on legal staff analysis
Client login and online account management
typical_results_timeline: Initial dispute results typically appear within 30-45 days; noticeable credit score improvement generally occurs within 3 months, with most clients completing the program in 6-8 months (range: 2-12 months depending on the number and complexity of negative items).
